params.name: Guinness World Records
params.description:
On Mar 2, 1955 AD, the first edition of the Guinness World Records was a hit, reaching the top of the weekly sales chart.
The Guinness World Records is a book that records various world records, covering multiple fields such as astronomy, geography, history, chemistry, and more. The birth of this book originated from an argument. Sir Hugh Beaver of the Guinness beer company argued with colleagues about which bird flew the fastest after failing to shoot a golden plover during a hunt. Because t …
